channel.title: TradHort on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in TradHort on Nature Works

item.title: Woke Gardening
item.description:
More reactionary horticulture in the media

And there’s more in the Reactionary Horticulture saga. Luckily, ecological landscaper Rebecca McMackin has been following it in her latest newsletter Sturgeon Moon. http://localhost:1313/blog/230815-woke-gardening/

item.title: Reactionary horticulture & the bastions of colonialism
item.description:
It was only a matter of time before the culture wars were made explicit in gardening

This from Rebecca McMackin’s newsletter Shots fired! Famed, old-guard British gardening celebrities have their knickers in a twist over any attempt to make ornamental gardens more ecological. http://localhost:1313/blog/230719-reactionary-horticulture/
